! Title: ShieldNova - Services / Amazon
! Description: Domain set for Amazon traffic routing.
! Author: Harry (https://github.com/harryheros)
! Homepage: https://github.com/harryheros/shieldnova
! License: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0
! Profile: Conservative / Compatibility-First
! Built: 2026-04-28 00:14:00 UTC
! Total: 13
! Breakdown: service_rules=13

! Amazon & AWS
! Purpose: service-specific routing for proxy tools.
! This is NOT a blocking list.

||amazon.com^                             ! Amazon - main platform
||amazon.co.jp^                           ! Amazon Japan
||amazon.co.uk^                           ! Amazon UK
||amazon.de^                              ! Amazon Germany
||amazon.sg^                              ! Amazon Singapore
||amazonaws.com^                          ! AWS - cloud infrastructure
||amazonws.com^                           ! AWS - alternative
||cloudfront.net^                         ! Amazon CloudFront CDN
||ssl-images-amazon.com^                  ! Amazon - image CDN
||media-amazon.com^                       ! Amazon - media CDN
||amazon-adsystem.com^                    ! Amazon - ad system
||primevideo.com^                         ! Prime Video
||twitch.tv^                              ! Twitch (Amazon)
